headline: Dell Technologies (DELL) Ends Distribution Relationship with Arrow ECS

headline: Before there were Trump Accounts, SEED OK gave some newborns $1,000 — how researchers say the grants affected kids
summary: Some state-sponsored programs paved the way for Trump Accounts, the new tax-deferred investing accounts for children.

headline: DELL TECHNOLOGIES -C (NYSE:DELL) Passes Minervini Trend Template and High Growth Momentum Screen
summary: Dell Technologies combines strong technical momentum with accelerating earnings growth. Trading above key moving averages, DELL shows 65% EPS growth and 98.2 relative strength rating, making it a high-growth stock worth watching.

headline: The Real Risk Inside Cisco Stock
summary: After a strong run, it’s natural for any Cisco Systems (CSCO) shareholder to feel confident. The stock is up 72% over the last year, powered by a story of transformation. The company is capturing surging AI demand, raising its forecast for AI infrastructure orders to $9 billion for the fiscal year. But when a stock has priced in this much success, the risks change. The question is no longer just about whether the company can grow, but whether it can grow in a way that justifies the new, higher e
